channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WAKEFIT] HDFC Mutual Fund Acquires 5.43% Stake in Wakefit Innovations Ltd
item.description:
HDFC Mutual Fund has acquired a 5.43% stake in Wakefit Innovations Ltd as of March 23, 2026. The total paid-up equity share capital of the company is Rs. 32,99,66,749 comprising 32,99,66,749 Equity Shares of Rs. 1/- each. The acquisition was made through open market, public issue, or preferential allotment. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 32,99,66,749/- comprising 32,99,66,749 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each.

  • HDFC Mutual Fund acquires 5.43% stake in Wakefit Innovations Ltd
  • The acquisition was made as of March 23, 2026
  • The total paid-up equity share capital of the company is Rs. 32,99,66,749 comprising 32,99,66,749 Equity Shares of Rs. 1/- each
  • The acquisition was made through open market, public issue, or preferential allotment
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition is Rs. 32,99,66,749/- comprising 32,99,66,749 equity shares of Rs. 1/- each

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Wakefit Innovations Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [KARBON] Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window for Financial Results
item.description:
Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for dealing in the equity shares of the company. The closure is in accordance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the date of declaration of Audited Financial Results for the half year/Year ended on 31st March, 2026. Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and the Connected Persons of the Company as defined under SEBI PIT Regulations are also intimated not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period.

  • Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd announces closure of trading window for financial results
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Closure in accordance with Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
  • Designated Persons, their Immediate Relatives, and Connected Persons also intimated not to trade during this period
  • Date of Board Meeting to approve the financial results for the half year/Year ended March 31, 2026, will be communicated separately

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Karbonsteel Engineering Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ASMS] Bartronics India Ltd Receives Purchase Order from Indian Overseas Bank as Corporate Business Correspondent Service Provider
item.description:
Bartronics India Ltd, formerly known as Avio Smart Market Stack Limited, has received a Purchase Order from Indian Overseas Bank for empanelment as a Corporate Business Correspondent Service Provider. The order is for engagement and management of Business Correspondent Agents (BCAs) under Financial Inclusion Technology. The contract is for a period of 3 years from the date of entering into the agreement and may be renewed further at the sole discretion of the Bank. The payment will be released on a monthly basis based on the actual numbers of enrolments / transactions reflected in the reports from the Bank's CBS server. The order is in the normal course of business/activity.

  • Bartronics India Ltd received a Purchase Order from Indian Overseas Bank for Corporate Business Correspondent Services
  • The contract is for a period of 3 years and may be renewed further
  • The payment will be released on a monthly basis based on actual enrolments / transactions
  • The order is in the normal course of business/activity
  • Bartronics India Ltd is formerly known as Avio Smart Market Stack Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BARTRONICS INDIA LTD. | Category: New Launch

item.title: [SADHNANIQ] Trading Window Closure for Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd's Q1 2026 Results
item.description:
Sadhana Nitro Chem Ltd has announced the closure of its trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives, as per the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading restriction period will commence from April 1, 2026, and will remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended on March 31, 2026. The National Securities Depository Limited has been designated to restrict trading by freezing the PAN at the security level for the company's ISIN-INE888C01040 in accordance with the SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-POD-2/P/CIR/2023/124 dated July 19, 2023.

  • Trading window closure for designated persons and their immediate relatives
  • Closure from April 1, 2026, till 48 hours after Q1 2026 results declaration
  • National Securities Depository Limited to restrict trading by freezing PAN at security level
  • Regulation in accordance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/ISD/ISD-POD-2/P/CIR/2023/124 dated July 19, 2023

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SADHANA NITROCHEM LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [ICICIGI] ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd. to Announce Q4 and FY2026 Results on April 15, 2026
item.description:
ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd. has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on April 15, 2026, in Mumbai, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results & Audited Financial Statements for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. The company may also recommend a final dividend for the financial year ending on March 31, 2026. In accordance with this, the trading window for dealing in the Securities of the Company will be closed for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, to April 17, 2026.

  • ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd. to announce Q4 and FY2026 results on April 15, 2026
  • Board meeting scheduled in Mumbai to consider and approve Audited Financial Results & Audited Financial Statements for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026
  • Company may recommend final dividend for FY2026
  • Trading window for dealing in Securities of the Company to be closed for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives from April 1, 2026, to April 17, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Lombard General Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [VSTL] Pratima Sandhir, Promoter of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd, Acquires 0.01% Shares
item.description:
Pratima Sandhir, Whole-Time Director and a person belonging to the promoter group of Vibhor Steel Tubes Limited, has acquired 2500 equity shares through an open market transaction on March 24, 2026. This acquisition constitutes 0.01% of the total paid-up capital of the company.

  • Pratima Sandhir, a promoter of Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd, acquired 2500 shares through an open market transaction.
  • The acquisition constitutes 0.01% of the total paid-up capital of the company.
  • The transaction took place on March 24, 2026.
  • The price per share was Rs. 109.5766.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Vibhor Steel Tubes Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [LAOPALA] La Opala RG Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window from April 1, 2026
item.description:
La Opala RG Ltd, in accordance with its Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Insider Trading, has announced the closure of the Trading Window for all Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives. The closure will be effective from April 1, 2026, until the completion of 48 hours after the declaration of the Audited Financial Results for the quarter and financial year ending on March 31, 2026. This decision has been communicated to all Designated Persons of the Company, including Directors, Officers, and Designated Employees.

  • La Opala RG Ltd announces closure of Trading Window from April 1, 2026
  • Closure is in accordance with the Company's Code of Conduct to Regulate, Monitor and Report Insider Trading
  • Trading Window to remain closed until completion of 48 hours after the declaration of Audited Financial Results
  • Closure effective for all Designated Persons and their Immediate Relatives
  • Notification has been sent to all Designated Persons, including Directors, Officers, and Designated Employees

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LA OPALA RG LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [PUNJCOMMU] Punjab Communications Ltd. Announces Reconstitution of Board Committees
item.description:
Punjab Communications Ltd. has announced the reconstitution of its Board Committees due to changes in Independent Directors. The new committees are as follows: Audit Committee, chaired by CA Shashi Bhushan Aggarwal, with Mr. Manjeet Singh Dhillon, ITS (Retd.) and Dr. Ashneet Kaur as members. The Nomination and Remuneration Committee is chaired by Mr. Manjeet Singh Dhillon, ITS (Retd.), with CA Shashi Bhushan Aggarwal and Dr. Ashneet Kaur as members. The Stakeholders Relationship Committee is chaired by Dr. Ashneet Kaur, with Mr. Manjeet Singh Dhillon, ITS (Retd.) and CA Shashi Bhushan Aggarwal as members.

  • Punjab Communications Ltd. reconstitutes Board Committees
  • Changes due to new Independent Directors
  • Three committees reconstituted: Audit, Nomination and Remuneration, and Stakeholders Relationship
  • CA Shashi Bhushan Aggarwal, Mr. Manjeet Singh Dhillon, ITS (Retd.), and Dr. Ashneet Kaur appointed as members

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PUNJAB COMMUNICATIONS LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CPML] City Pulse Multiventures Ltd Announces Closure of Trading Window
item.description:
City Pulse Multiventures Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all insiders, designated persons, and their relatives. The closure will be in effect from Wednesday, April 01st 2026 until 48 hours after the declaration of audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The date of the Board Meeting for the declaration of the audited Financial Results will be intimated in due course.

  • City Pulse Multiventures Ltd announces closure of trading window
  • Trading window to be closed for all insiders, designated persons, and their relatives
  • Closure effective from April 01st 2026
  • Closure to remain in effect until 48 hours after the declaration of audited Financial Results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026
  • Date of Board Meeting for the declaration of the audited Financial Results to be intimated later

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: City Pulse Multiplex Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JUBLFOOD] Trading Window Closure Announced by Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd for Quarter and Year Ending March 31, 2026
item.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd has announced the closure of the trading window for all Designated Persons and their immediate relatives. The closure is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading under the SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015. The trading window will remain closed from Wednesday, April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after the announcement of the Financial Results for the quarter and year ending March 31, 2026. The Designated Persons have been informed not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period. The date of the Board Meeting for approval of Financial Results is yet to be intimated.

  • Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd announces closure of trading window for Designated Persons and their immediate relatives.
  • Closure is in accordance with the Company’s Code of Conduct for Prevention of Insider Trading under SEBI regulations.
  • Trading window to remain closed from April 01, 2026 till 48 hours after announcement of Financial Results for quarter and year ending March 31, 2026.
  • Designated Persons informed not to trade in the securities of the Company during this period.
  • Date of Board Meeting for approval of Financial Results yet to be intimated.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Jubilant FoodWorks Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
